claimText: From Semester 1 2025, University of Sydney guidance says students may use automated writing tools or generative AI for assessments other than supervised examinations and supervised in-semester tests unless the unit coordinator expressly prohibits it.

citation.citationTitle: Aligning our assessments to the age of generative AI
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
